citation: Etula et al 2020 JFQA (Dash for Cash); Beneish-Whaley 2002 J. Finance (S&P 500 Index Replacements)

spec_decision.rule: KEEP if holdout_sharpe>=0.5 AND >=4/5 gates AND avg_holdout>0; CONDITIONAL if 3/5 AND avg_holdout>0; KILL otherwise

scaling_tier.rationale: Tier 1/2: ~12 trades/yr × 1c = noise. Tier 3 ($25K-$100K) is where this becomes decision-critical: ZERO calendar overlap with QEF (last 3 days of Q-end month vs first 3 of Q-start month) — temporally orthogonal sibling sleeve.

small_n_caveats: 4 quarters/yr × 3 days × 5y = ~60 candidate sessions; after ATR/VIX filter typically ~40-50 actual trades.
Holdout (Y5) covers 4 quarter-starts × 3 days = 12 sessions, matching QEF holdout N exactly. Coin-flip Sharpe at this N.
PBO is degenerate with 1 combo (no in-sample selection). Operator must focus on MEAN P&L PER TRADE and holdout sign-match.
